name_he: משפטים - כתב העת של הפקולטה למשפטים, האוניברסיטה העברית
name_en: Mishpatim - Hebrew University Law Review
publisher: Faculty of Law, Hebrew University of Jerusalem
access: open
historical_coverage: Founded 1968; site hosts recent volumes (vol. 50s, 2020s) plus online companion 'Mishpatim Al Atar' (issues 1-23+); older volumes mainly via Nevo/print
full_text: yes - articles readable/downloadable on site for hosted volumes
metadata_availability: good - per-article pages with title/author/abstract
terms_status: no explicit terms page observed on journal site
rag_permission: unclear - academic copyright, no reuse license; index/metadata safe, full-text ingestion needs permission
legal_risk: medium (copyrighted academic content, no reuse license)
recommended_ingestion: crawl article pages for metadata + abstracts; full-text RAG only after publisher permission
example_documents: Vol. 55 articles on constitutional law, social-media regulation, criminal procedure; Mishpatim Al Atar issues 19, 23
notes: Israel's most cited Hebrew law review. Site includes advanced search. Older volumes not fully digitized on this site (available in Nevo, closed).

name_he: עיוני משפט - כתב העת של הפקולטה למשפטים, אוניברסיטת תל אביב
name_en: Iyunei Mishpat - Tel Aviv University Law Review
publisher: Buchmann Faculty of Law, Tel Aviv University
access: open (restricted-use terms)
historical_coverage: Founded 1971; site hosts recent volumes (vol. 49, 2025-2026) and 'Forum Iyunei Mishpat' online companion; older volumes partly on faculty site/Nevo
full_text: yes - full-text access on site for hosted volumes
metadata_availability: good - article pages with abstracts
terms_status: explicit on-site notice: use permitted for pedagogic/academic/research purposes only; commercial use prohibited
license_status: all-rights-reserved with non-commercial academic-use permission stated on site
rag_permission: restricted - explicit non-commercial/academic-only clause; commercial legal-tech RAG requires license
legal_risk: medium-high for commercial reuse (explicit prohibition); low for metadata
recommended_ingestion: metadata + abstracts only unless TAU grants license; respect explicit non-commercial terms
example_documents: Vol. 49(1) special issue marking 30 years since a foundational work; vol. 49(2) current articles
notes: Site carries explicit Hebrew terms: 'הגישה למאמרים... לצרכים פדגוגים, אקדמיים ומחקריים בלבד. חל איסור על שימוש מסחרי'.

name_he: מחקרי משפט - כתב העת של הפקולטה למשפטים, אוניברסיטת בר-אילן
name_en: Mehkarei Mishpat - Bar-Ilan University Law Studies
publisher: Faculty of Law, Bar-Ilan University (distributed via BIU Press)
access: metadata-only online; full text via print purchase (BIU Press) and closed databases (Nevo)
historical_coverage: Founded 1980; ~35+ volumes; faculty page describes journal, purchase via biupress.co.il
full_text: no - no free full text observed on faculty page; purchase model
metadata_availability: limited - journal description page only; volume TOCs via BIU Press catalog
rag_permission: no - full text not openly available
recommended_ingestion: bibliographic metadata only (via IHP/RAMBI indexes); do not ingest full text
example_documents: Journal description page; volumes sold at biupress.co.il (e.g. Mehkarei Mishpat vol. 1)
notes: Leading BIU journal, strong on Jewish law (Mishpat Ivri). Unlike Haifa/TAU/HUJI journals, no open full-text archive found.

name_en: Mishpat u-Mimshal (Law and Government) - University of Haifa
publisher: Faculty of Law, University of Haifa
access: open - full-issue and article PDFs hosted on faculty site (law.haifa.ac.il/wp-content/uploads/...)
historical_coverage: Founded 1992; site hosts PDFs at least for 2010s-2020s volumes (e.g. 2022-2023 files observed); special issues (e.g. Law and COVID)
full_text: yes - direct PDF links observed (e.g. /wp-content/uploads/2023/11/lawgov-202231122-gad.pdf)
metadata_availability: moderate - WordPress issue pages with TOCs
robots_policy: unknown - robots.txt unreachable during checks (server errors), automated fetch failed
rag_permission: unclear - open PDFs but no reuse license
recommended_ingestion: crawl issue pages + PDFs politely with backoff; metadata first, full text pending permission
example_documents: https://law.haifa.ac.il/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/lawgov-202231122-gad.pdf (Gad Barzilai article); COVID special issue
notes: Flagship Israeli public-law journal. law.haifa.ac.il consistently failed automated fetch (robots.txt read errors) though direct PDF URLs are indexed by search engines - verify manually before ingestion.

name_he: דין ודברים - כתב עת משפטי בין-תחומי
name_en: Din u-Dvarim (Haifa Law Review) - University of Haifa
publisher: Faculty of Law, University of Haifa
access: open - issue PDFs hosted on faculty site
historical_coverage: Founded 2004; volumes through at least vol. 17 (2024) with per-volume pages (vol. 14(2) 2021, 16(1) 2022, 17 2024 observed)
full_text: yes - direct PDFs observed (e.g. /wp-content/uploads/2024/01/din17-editor.pdf)
metadata_availability: moderate - WordPress volume pages with TOCs
robots_policy: unknown - robots.txt unreachable during checks, automated fetch failed
rag_permission: unclear - open PDFs but no reuse license
stability: medium (same flaky server as Mishpat u-Mimshal)
recommended_ingestion: crawl volume pages + PDFs with backoff; metadata-first approach
example_documents: https://law.haifa.ac.il/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/din17-editor.pdf; vol. 16(1) page dated 2022-08
notes: Interdisciplinary Haifa journal. Same host and same automated-fetch problems as Mishpat u-Mimshal.

name_he: המשפט - כתב העת של בית הספר למשפטים, המסלול האקדמי המכללה למינהל
name_en: HaMishpat Law Review - College of Management Academic Studies (COLMAN)
publisher: Haim Striks School of Law, College of Management Academic Studies
access: metadata/TOC open; full text mostly not free (volume purchase via editorial office)
historical_coverage: Founded 1993; site lists volumes 25-32+ plus special issues with article-level TOCs
full_text: no - article titles/authors listed by volume, no free download links observed; purchase via mishpat@colman.ac.il
metadata_availability: good - article-level TOC metadata by volume
rag_permission: no for full text; metadata harvesting feasible
legal_risk: high for full text; low for metadata
recommended_ingestion: harvest article metadata/TOCs only; full text via Nevo license if needed
example_documents: Volume index pages vols. 25-32; about page (?page_id=31); past volumes page (?page_id=1273)
notes: Leading college (non-university) law review. Full text of many volumes exists in closed databases (Nevo).

name_en: Hukim - Journal on Legislation
publisher: Faculty of Law, Hebrew University of Jerusalem (Sacher Institute for Legislative Research and Comparative Law)
access: open - issue pages with full articles hosted on law.huji.ac.il
historical_coverage: Founded 2009; issues at least through vol. 13+ ('גיליון יב', 'גיליון יג' pages observed) plus short-form 'Hukim BeKtzara'
full_text: yes - issue pages (incl. HTML export) observed on faculty site
metadata_availability: moderate - issue TOC pages
robots_policy: unknown - law.huji.ac.il robots.txt unreachable during checks, automated fetch failed
rag_permission: unclear - open text, no reuse license
recommended_ingestion: crawl issue pages (e.g. law.huji.ac.il/book/גיליון-יב) for text + metadata after permission check
example_documents: https://law.huji.ac.il/book/גיליון-יב ; https://law.huji.ac.il/book/גיליון-יג ; חוקים בקצרה page
notes: Only Israeli journal dedicated to legislation studies - highly relevant to legal-tech statutory work. Sister journal list at sacherinstitute.huji.ac.il.

name_en: HaPraklit - Israel Bar Association Law Journal
publisher: Israel Bar Association (Bar Publishing House)
access: open in browser; article PDFs hosted under /_Uploads/dbsAttachedFiles/; site blocks automated fetchers (403)
historical_coverage: Founded 1943 (oldest Israeli law journal); site has volume gallery and history section; extent of digitized backfile unknown
full_text: partial - individual article PDFs found (e.g. /_Uploads/dbsAttachedFiles/6_anidjar.pdf); full backfile coverage unknown
metadata_availability: moderate - category/volume gallery pages
robots_policy: blocks bots - returned HTTP 403 / HTTPS-to-HTTP redirect loop to automated clients
rag_permission: unclear - no license; site anti-bot posture suggests permission needed
technical_difficulty: high (403 to automation, HTTP-only, legacy ASP CMS)
recommended_ingestion: approach Israel Bar for permission; until then metadata only from indexes
example_documents: http://hapraklit.co.il/_Uploads/dbsAttachedFiles/6_anidjar.pdf ; about page ?CategoryID=194 ; volume gallery ?CategoryID=214
notes: Historic Bar journal since 1943. Site served 403 to our fetchers over both HTTPS and HTTP; PDFs are nonetheless indexed by search engines.

name_he: לשכת עורכי הדין - פרסומים וביטאון 'אתיקה מקצועית'
name_en: Israel Bar Association - Publications and 'Professional Ethics' Bulletin
publisher: Israel Bar Association (לשכת עורכי הדין בישראל)
access: open - flipbook library (cld.bz platform) with ethics bulletins and annual activity reports; main site israelbar.org.il blocks automated fetchers (403)
historical_coverage: 'אתיקה מקצועית' bulletin issues (issue 78, Nov 2025, verified; series runs from mid-2000s); annual activity reports 2022-2024 observed
full_text: yes - flipbook full text readable; older ethics bulletins also circulate as PDFs
metadata_availability: poor - flipbook platform, weak structured metadata
robots_policy: main site israelbar.org.il returned 403 to automation; cld.bz flipbooks indexed by search engines
rag_permission: unclear - official professional-body guidance, but no reuse license; ethics guidance has quasi-normative value
update_frequency: several bulletin issues/year; annual reports yearly
stability: medium (content split across israelbar.org.il, cld.bz, legacy mirrors)
legal_risk: medium (copyright; but ethics rules/decisions are of public regulatory character)
recommended_ingestion: extract ethics bulletins ('אתיקה מקצועית') and national ethics committee guidelines; contact Bar for structured access
example_documents: https://israelbar.cld.bz/professional-ethics-issue-78 (issue 78, Nov 2025: national + district ethics committee rulings on privilege, conflicts, solicitation) ; https://israelbar.cld.bz/activity-report-2024
notes: Ethics committee decisions/guidelines are the key legal-tech asset here. Main site www.israelbar.org.il consistently 403 to bots; some content mirrored on district sites (e.g. tabar.org.il/ethica).

name_en: Israel Democracy Institute (IDI)
publisher: Israel Democracy Institute
access: open - free downloads ('הורדה חינם') of books, policy papers, position papers
historical_coverage: Founded 1991; publications archive spans 1990s-2026; includes constitutional drafts, policy research, statistical yearbooks
full_text: yes - free PDF downloads for most research publications
metadata_availability: good - publication pages with authors, dates, abstracts
license_status: all-rights-reserved ('© כל הזכויות שמורות למכון הישראלי לדמוקרטיה'); free-of-charge download but no CC license
rag_permission: unclear - free access but rights reserved; permission recommended for full-text RAG
recommended_ingestion: crawl publications section (Hebrew+English); metadata + abstracts immediately, full PDFs after permission
example_documents: Policy papers on judicial reform; annual Israeli Democracy Index; constitutional research series
notes: The most important non-university producer of Israeli constitutional/public-law research. English site at en.idi.org.il.

name_en: Kohelet Policy Forum
publisher: Kohelet Policy Forum
access: open - policy papers freely downloadable, no registration
historical_coverage: Founded 2012; policy papers 2012-2026 incl. judicial-reform materials
full_text: yes - PDFs downloadable without paywall
metadata_availability: moderate - publication pages with author/date
terms_status: no explicit copyright statement observed on homepage
rag_permission: unclear
last_observed_update: 2026-07 (current content incl. education, broadcasting regulation, judicial reform papers)
legal_risk: medium (unknown license); note politically contested source - flag perspective in metadata
recommended_ingestion: crawl policy-paper PDFs + metadata; tag ideological orientation for balanced retrieval
example_documents: Judicial reform policy papers; regulation and free-market legal analyses
notes: Influential conservative/libertarian think tank (architect of 2023 judicial-overhaul proposals). Pair with IDI/Zulat for viewpoint balance.

name_en: Institute for National Security Studies (INSS)
publisher: Institute for National Security Studies, Tel Aviv University-affiliated
access: open - publications freely accessible on site
historical_coverage: INSS (since 2006, successor to JCSS 1977); publications archive with Insights, memoranda, Strategic Assessment journal
full_text: yes - publications readable/downloadable on site
metadata_availability: good - publication archive with filters by topic/type
terms_status: privacy policy and terms of use page exists; details not reviewed
rag_permission: unclear
recommended_ingestion: ingest only 'Law and National Security' research-area publications to keep corpus legally focused
example_documents: Law and National Security program papers; judicial-overhaul analyses; Strategic Assessment articles
notes: Only the legal research program is in scope; most INSS output is strategic/military rather than legal.

name_en: Zulat Institute for Equality and Human Rights
publisher: Zulat - for Equality and Human Rights (registered NGO 580679371)
access: open - position papers and reports published on site
historical_coverage: Founded 2020; position papers 2020-2026 (e.g. fake news & human rights 2021; legal infrastructure of protest suppression 2024)
full_text: yes - reports, position papers, legislative proposals and Knesset testimony freely accessible on site
metadata_availability: moderate - WordPress category pages (ניירות עמדה)
terms_status: no explicit copyright statement observed on homepage
rag_permission: unclear
legal_risk: medium (unknown license); advocacy NGO - flag perspective
recommended_ingestion: crawl ניירות-עמדה category; tag as progressive advocacy research for viewpoint balance
example_documents: https://zulat.org.il/category/פרסומים/ניירות-עמדה/ ; 'התשתית החוקית לדיכוי מחאה והפגנות בישראל' (2024)
notes: Left-leaning human-rights think tank (counterweight to Kohelet). Verification limited by fetch-proxy rate limiting, not by the site.

name_en: Knesset Research and Information Center (RIC / MMM)
publisher: The Knesset
access: open - all reports freely downloadable as PDF
historical_coverage: RIC founded 2000; thousands of research documents 2000-2026, searchable at main.knesset.gov.il/Activity/Info/Research/pages/search.aspx
full_text: yes - PDF reports
metadata_availability: good - document search with date/topic/author
api_type: none (Knesset OData API covers parliamentary data, not clearly MMM docs)
robots_policy: reachable but hostile to bots: www.knesset.gov.il/mmm returned HTTP 474 (WAF), search page (SharePoint) returns JS-only empty content to fetchers
license_status: state-produced content; broad reuse customary for Knesset documents but no explicit open license verified
rag_permission: likely-yes (official parliamentary research, publicly distributed) - confirm terms
technical_difficulty: high (WAF returns 474 to bots; SharePoint search is JS-rendered)
recommended_ingestion: harvest via document search page (needs JS-capable crawler); deduplicate with parliamentary-sources registry section (overlap noted)
example_documents: Comparative legislation surveys, e.g. reports cited in bill explanatory notes; search portal main.knesset.gov.il/Activity/Info/Research/pages/search.aspx
notes: OVERLAP: likely also covered in the parliamentary/primary-sources section of the registry - keep single canonical entry. Gateway blocked direct fetch of knesset.gov.il this session; existence and open PDF access are well established.

name_en: State Comptroller and Ombudsman of Israel
publisher: Office of the State Comptroller and Ombudsman
access: open - audit reports in digital library, organized by subject
historical_coverage: Annual and special audit reports; recent content through 2026 (incl. October 7 audits); digital library depth for older decades unknown
full_text: yes - full reports in digital library
metadata_availability: good - subject-organized report library
api_type: none observed (data.gov.il may hold some datasets)
terms_status: terms-of-use page exists (תנאי שימוש); details not reviewed
license_status: state-produced official reports; no explicit open license verified
rag_permission: likely-yes (official public audit reports) - confirm site terms
update_frequency: several major reports/year plus rolling special reports
recommended_ingestion: crawl digital library by subject; reports are citable authority in administrative-law contexts
example_documents: Audit reports by subject (דוחות הביקורת לפי נושאים); October 7 special audit series
notes: Borderline academic - included as official research/oversight literature frequently cited in legal scholarship and litigation.

name_en: Israel State Archives
publisher: Israel State Archives (Prime Minister's Office)
primary_or_secondary: primary (historical records) with secondary finding aids
access: open - online search over digitized collections; some files require reading-room/declassification process
historical_coverage: Mandate era to present; 257 million scanned pages, 375k images, audio/video; includes government legal files, cabinet minutes, historic legislation records
full_text: partial - massive digitization but OCR/full-text search quality varies; many files scanned images only
metadata_availability: good - catalog with basic and advanced search
terms_status: terms of use referenced; 'All rights reserved to the State Archives 2026' footer
license_status: mixed - state records generally reusable, but archive asserts rights; per-file copyright varies (third-party materials)
rag_permission: unclear - metadata yes; document images case-by-case
technical_difficulty: high (scan-image corpus, weak OCR, no API)
recommended_ingestion: index catalog metadata for legal-history retrieval; defer document-image ingestion
example_documents: Declaration of Independence drafts; cabinet minutes; Mandate-era legal records
notes: Court-history/legal-history value (e.g. drafting history of Basic Laws). Not a scholarship source per se.

name_he: סדרת מאמרי SSRN - הפקולטה למשפטים, האוניברסיטה העברית (ומאמרי משפט ישראליים ב-SSRN)
name_en: SSRN - Hebrew University of Jerusalem Legal Studies Research Paper Series (and Israeli law papers on SSRN)
publisher: SSRN (Elsevier) / Hebrew University of Jerusalem Faculty of Law
access: open - most papers free to download from papers.ssrn.com (free account sometimes prompted)
historical_coverage: HUJI law series and Israeli-authored papers from ~2000s to present; SSRN also hosts Hebrew Research Network (HRN) with Hebrew-language papers
full_text: yes - author-uploaded PDFs, mostly free
metadata_availability: excellent - structured metadata, abstracts (Hebrew+English), JEL codes
api_type: none public (SSRN has no open API; scraping prohibited by ToS)
auth_required: no for browsing; account sometimes required for download
robots_policy: restrictive on papers.ssrn.com; faculty index page on en.law.huji.ac.il was unreachable to our fetcher this session
license_status: author-retained copyright; no blanket reuse license
rag_permission: no for bulk full text (ToS); metadata/abstract linking acceptable
last_observed_update: unknown (index page not opened this session)
hebrew_quality: good (HRN hosts Hebrew abstracts/papers; interface English)
recommended_ingestion: link-out + manual metadata curation only; no bulk harvesting
example_documents: HUJI ILF research paper series page (en.law.huji.ac.il/book/ssrn); Hebrew Research Network (ssrn.com/index.cfm/en/hrn/); e.g. Zamir, 'Towards an Integrative Legal Scholarship' (SSRN 2404242)
notes: Best single point for Israeli legal scholarship preprints incl. Hebrew papers (HRN). HUJI faculty index page timed out to bots; SSRN itself is Cloudflare-protected.

name_he: מפתח חיפה למאמרים (המפתח למאמרים בעברית, IHP)
name_en: IHP - Index to Hebrew Periodicals (Haifa Index)
publisher: University of Haifa Library (Younes & Soraya Nazarian Library), on ExLibris/Primo infrastructure
legal_domains: general (indexes all Hebrew periodicals incl. all major law journals)
access: subscription - institutional/public-library/school login portals; not open to anonymous public
historical_coverage: Indexes Hebrew periodical articles since 1977 (retrospective coverage varies); includes Israeli law reviews
full_text: no - index only (some records link to full text elsewhere)
metadata_availability: excellent - structured bibliographic records with subject headings
api_type: Primo/ExLibris APIs exist for subscribers; no public API
rag_permission: no without license
recommended_ingestion: consider subscription for metadata enrichment of Hebrew law-journal citations; do not scrape
example_documents: Login portal page listing university/public/school access; journal and monograph lists; contact ihp@univ.haifa.ac.il
notes: The de-facto citation index for Hebrew legal literature. Useful for building a bibliography layer, not a text corpus.

name_en: RAMBI - Index of Articles on Jewish Studies (National Library of Israel)
publisher: National Library of Israel
access: open - free bibliographic search via NLI catalog interface
historical_coverage: Founded 1966 by Dr. Issachar Joel; print vols. 1-50 until 2000, converted to online; ~350,000 records by 2013; updated daily; includes Halakhah/Jewish-law scholarship worldwide
full_text: no - index only
metadata_availability: excellent - MARC-based records in NLI catalog (Primo)
api_type: NLI open-library APIs / OAI-PMH and Primo search APIs cover NLI catalog data (RAMBI records included; confirm scope with NLI)
feeds: RSS service historically offered (web.nli.org.il rambi-rss page)
bulk_download: unknown (NLI provides data services on request)
license_status: bibliographic metadata - generally low-restriction; NLI asserts site copyright
rag_permission: likely-yes for metadata (facts/bibliography); confirm NLI data-reuse policy
recommended_ingestion: use for Mishpat-Ivri/legal-history bibliography enrichment via NLI APIs
example_documents: RAMBI info page at NLI; legacy RSS page web.nli.org.il/.../rambi-rss.aspx; library guides at BIU law library
notes: Key for Jewish-law (משפט עברי) scholarship coverage that general legal indexes miss. NLI also digitizes historical Israeli legal journals (JPress etc.).

name_he: עבודות דוקטור של האוניברסיטה העברית (רשימת תלמידי מחקר)
name_en: Hebrew University Doctoral Dissertations Listing / HUJI open-access resources
publisher: Hebrew University of Jerusalem
access: open listing; full-text availability per dissertation varies (many theses deposited at NLI or library catalog, access restrictions common)
historical_coverage: unknown - legacy CGI listing of research-student doctoral works
full_text: unknown - listing verified only via search; Israeli universities lack a unified open thesis repository
metadata_availability: basic
robots_policy: unknown - huji.ac.il unreachable via our egress gateway this session
rag_permission: no for full text without per-work check
recommended_ingestion: do not ingest; use NLI theses collection and library catalogs for dissertation discovery instead
example_documents: Doctoral works listing CGI; HUJI open-access LibGuide (huji-il.libguides.com/c.php?g=859434)
notes: IMPORTANT FINDING: no Israeli university (TAU/HUJI/BIU/Haifa) operates a true open institutional repository with OAI-PMH for law theses/articles - open-access presence is via journals' own sites, SSRN, and NLI deposits. TAU library pages describe OA publishing support but no public IR.

name_he: מרכז מינרבה לחקר שלטון החוק במצבי קיצון (אוניברסיטת חיפה)
name_en: Minerva Center for the Rule of Law under Extreme Conditions - University of Haifa
publisher: University of Haifa (Minerva Center, with University of Hamburg)
access: open - research publications listed/linked on center site
historical_coverage: Center active since 2014; publications page aggregates researcher output (articles, reports, working papers)
full_text: partial - mix of open PDFs and links to journal-published (paywalled) versions
metadata_availability: moderate
rag_permission: unclear
recommended_ingestion: index publications list; ingest only openly hosted PDFs
example_documents: https://minervaxtremelaw.haifa.ac.il/research-publications/ (alphabetical author bibliography; many items 'Available at SSRN')
notes: Niche but high-value for emergency powers / wartime law - a live topic in Israeli law. Publications page is largely a bibliography linking out (SSRN, journals); multilingual (EN/HE/DE).

name_en: Din Online - Israeli and international legal news aggregator
publisher: Lipsky Labs (lipskylabs.com)
access: open - free browsing; free registration for extras (comments, weekly digest, saved articles)
historical_coverage: recent legal news; archive depth unknown
full_text: summaries only - site states original-content rights remain with linked sources; it publishes summary + link
metadata_availability: moderate - categorized news items
terms_status: rights notice: original content rights reserved to indicated sources; summaries + links only
license_status: aggregator - underlying rights belong to third parties
rag_permission: no for underlying content; site itself is derivative summaries
recommended_ingestion: skip for corpus; optionally monitor as a current-awareness feed only
example_documents: Category pages: Israeli law, international law, criminal, IP, labor, commercial, human rights
notes: VERIFICATION CORRECTION: this is a news aggregator for legal professionals, NOT an academic database or bibliography. Included for completeness with low scores; not the rumored 'DIN' bibliography.
